name: orderMustContainAtLeastOneItem()
description:
Orders submitted through checkout must contain at least one line item.
Empty orders represent an invalid transaction.
descriptionHtml:
Orders submitted through checkout must contain at least one line item.
Empty orders represent an invalid transaction.
